properties.displayName: Audit managed disks encrypted with a platform-managed key
properties.description: Ensure that Managed disks are encrypted with PMK (Platform Managed Keys). PMK encryption is enabled by default.
nonComplianceMessages: Managed disks configuration do not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: Audit managed disks are encrypted with a platform-managed key. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code.
